page: Amazon Web Services i8g.12xlarge is a storage-optimized server instance powered by the AWS Graviton Neoverse-V2 processor. Utilizing the arm64 architecture, this instance features 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs running at 2.8 GHz with no hyperthreading. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the instance includes a bundled 11250 GB NVMe SSD. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 28 Gbps, managed via the AWS Nitro hypervisor.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core performance and exceptional memory throughput. The instance achieves top-tier results in large-block uncached memory read and write bandwidth, as well as in PassMark memory tests. Multi-threaded decompression and Geekbench multi-core processing also rank in the top tier. Database operations show high efficiency, supported by strong Redis SET performance and top-tier static web serving throughput. However, while text generation for medium and large language models is strong, small-model text generation performance is relatively weak.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the i8g.12xlarge offers a high density of local NVMe storage paired with dedicated Arm-based compute resources, reducing the need for external block storage attachments. This resource balance makes the instance highly suitable for storage-intensive and database-driven workloads, such as large-scale relational databases, NoSQL platforms, high-throughput web serving, and data decompression pipelines.
description: Amazon Web Services i8g.12xlarge is a storage-optimized server instance powered by the 64-bit ARM Neoverse-V2 processor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs running at 2.8 GHz, paired with 384.0 GB of memory and a bundled 11250 GB NVMe SSD. Operating on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 28 Gbps. Performance benchmarks highlight top-tier memory bandwidth, multi-threaded decompression, and database operations, alongside strong multi-core CPU capabilities. While text generation for small language models is weak, the instance excels in medium and large model inference. This hardware profile provides a cost-effective balance of high-density local storage and dedicated compute resources. The i8g.12xlarge is highly suited for high-throughput database operations, static web serving, and data-intensive processing workloads.
og_description: Amazon Web Services i8g.12xlarge is an arm64 storage-optimized server with 48 dedicated cores, 384 GB RAM, and 11250 GB NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier database and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services i8g.12xlarge is an arm64 storage-optimized server featuring 48 dedicated cores, 384 GB RAM, and 11250 GB NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: A storage-optimized ARM server featuring dedicated physical cores, massive NVMe capacity, and top-tier memory bandwidth for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated ARM Neoverse-V2 physical cores running at 2.8 GHz
11250 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
384.0 GB of system memory with top-tier read and write bandwidth
28 Gbps baseline network bandwidth powered by the Nitro hypervisor
Optimized for high-throughput database operations and static web serving
